phd_program_timeline.title: ACADEMIC PLAN COMMITTEE (APC)
phd_program_timeline.description: Group of graduate faculty who guide and evaluate the student.
phd_program_timeline.timing: Encouraged to complete as early as possible.
phd_program_timeline.constraint: Must be approved BEFORE academic plan can be reviewed.

phd_program_timeline.title: ACADEMIC PLAN
phd_program_timeline.description: List of courses taken and planned to meet degree requirements.
phd_program_timeline.approval_deadline: Must be approved by Graduate College, committee, and DOGE at least 3 calendar months before preliminary oral exam.
phd_program_timeline.instructions_location: Graduate College website > Academic Plan (POSC Replacement)

phd_program_timeline.title: PRELIMINARY ORAL EXAM
phd_program_timeline.timing: Must be completed at least six months before the final oral exam.

phd_program_timeline.title: APPLY FOR PROGRAM COMPLETION
phd_program_timeline.action: Check Workday transcript for unresolved grades (I, N, NP, F).

phd_program_timeline.title: FORMAT CHECK
phd_program_timeline.action: Review Thesis/Dissertation Format Requirements or meet with Center for Communication Excellence (CCE).

phd_program_timeline.title: FINAL ORAL EXAM REQUEST
phd_program_timeline.action: Confirm date/time/location with major professor(s) and committee members.
phd_program_timeline.submission_deadline: Must be submitted three weeks prior to exam date.

phd_program_timeline.title: OPEN YOUR DISSERTATION ACCOUNT WITH ProQUEST
phd_program_timeline.action: Input title of dissertation for Commencement Program.
phd_program_timeline.deadline: No later than the deadline date.

scholarly_document_fee.name: Scholarly Document Fee (formerly Thesis Fee)
scholarly_document_fee.details: One-time fee for students submitting dissertation/thesis/creative component to digital repository.

phd_program_timeline.title: GRADUATE APPROVAL FORM and RESULTS OF FINAL ORAL EXAM
phd_program_timeline.action: Review and approval of final dissertation format/content by major professor(s) and DOGE(s).
phd_program_timeline.requirement: Graduate Student Approval Form needed by Thesis Office.
phd_program_timeline.notification: Graduate College must be notified that conditions have been met by deadline date.
phd_program_timeline.instructions_location: Graduate College website > Oral Examinations > Graduate Approval Form

phd_program_timeline.title: UPLOAD AND SUBMIT YOUR FINAL DISSERTATION to ProQUEST/UMI
phd_program_timeline.requirement: Must be approved by Graduate College before graduation.
phd_program_timeline.post_completion: Congratulations! Ceremony and diploma distribution info on Graduation and Commencement website.
